rationale: Epic-2 course-correction story (issue #232 DNS-rotation fix); EIGHTEENTH Epic 2 trace-WAIVED + FIRST Epic-2 course-correction-origin trace-WAIVED. Story 2.18 was authored by /bmad-correct-course for issue #232 then canonicalised + SM-validated through identical lifecycle gates (canonicalisation iter-347 + SM-validation iter-348 + ATDD-skip iter-349 + dev-story landing iter-350 + trace iter-351). Five P2 ACs uniform per FR14n Epic-2-substrate precedent. TWENTY-EIGHTH cumulative trace-WAIVED precedent extending Story 2.17 iter-340 twenty-seventh (Stories 1.7 iter-4 + 1.8 iter-3 + 1.9 iter-3 + 1.10 iter-46 + 1.11 iter-57 + 1.12 iter-64 + 1.13 iter-71 + 1.14 iter-78 + 1.15 iter-85 + 1.16 iter-92 → 2.1 iter-126 → 2.2 iter-149 → 2.3 iter-159 → 2.4 iter-175 → 2.5 iter-188 → 2.6 iter-202 → 2.7 iter-224 → 2.8 iter-231 → 2.9 iter-242 → 2.10 iter-249 → 2.11 iter-258 → 2.12 iter-269 → 2.13 iter-284 → 2.14 iter-292 → 2.15 iter-299 → 2.16 iter-306 → 2.17 iter-340 → 2.18 iter-351 = TWENTY-EIGHTH cumulative trace-WAIVED). Ground-(a)+(b)+(c) variant-(ii)+(iii) hybrid conjunction: (a) substrate verification across all 5 ACs at iter-351 trace baseline — AC 1 via reload-egress.sh:300-313 awk emission (16 nftset= directives × 8 rotating GitHub-class domains; per-domain three-line block ordering server= → nftset=v4 → nftset=v6 per Subtask 3.3) + iter-env Subtask 9.1; AC 2 via egress.nft:64-72 set declarations (gh_v4 + gh_v6 with flags timeout; timeout 600s at table scope) + :122 (v4 chain accept) + :159 (v6 chain accept) + ordering before KEEL_EGRESS_V4_MARKER_START (:124) and KEEL_EGRESS_V6_MARKER_START (:161); AC 3 via mechanism wiring substrate-verifies (PARTIAL-AC ground-(c) variant-(ii) on live-kernel half per RALPH.md iter-299); AC 4 via egress.nft:115-116 static CIDR fallback (140.82.112.0/20 + 192.30.252.0/22) with three-way ordering static-CIDR → @gh_v4 accept → marker block; AC 5 via iteration-env unit half (Subtasks 9.1 + 9.2 + 9.3 bash -n PASS at iter-351 trace baseline + inline SC-11 dual-composer parity smoke at iter-350 — byte-identical composed whitelist + byte-identical .classification sidecar via diff -q + mode 0644). (b) no global test runner wired at Story 2.18 substrate stage — recursive probe at iter-351 orient returns zero matches at the global level; pnpm --filter @keel/keel-invariants test runs Story 2.17's prompt-injection-rules tests covering s4-* rule surface, NOT Story 2.18 ACs; Epic 13 delivers framework landing per 27-precedent chain. PARTIAL ground-(c) variant-(ii) narrowed to (i) AC 3's live-kernel state (chicken-and-egg: requires Story 2.5 hardened-posture container with cap_add: [NET_ADMIN, NET_RAW] + DNS upstream connectivity, which is the very bug being fixed) + (ii) AC 5's operator-workstation behavioural half (Subtask 9.4 full live container test + Subtask 9.5 SC-7 flush table → re-fill round-trip; backend-B carve-out per Story 2.1 iter-127 + Story 2.3 iter-159 + Story 2.4 iter-176 precedent). PARTIAL ground-(c) variant-(iii) via 11 pinned scope-clarifications (SC-1 through SC-11) + 4 risk-register entries + forthcoming /bmad-code-review (args: "2") adversarial fan-out substituting for red-phase scaffolds at the unit half. Story 2.18 lands in same posture-class as Stories 2.1–2.16 (substrate-verification + iteration-env config-render smokes); WEAKER than Story 2.17 iter-340 which uniquely shipped wired node:test runner + 74 persisted replay fixtures (Story 2.17's ground-(a) FURTHER-HARDENED posture was a structural artefact of Epic-2 final-story bypass-resistance scope; Story 2.18 returns to the standard Epic-2 substrate-extension class). The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is structural artefact — no persistent test runner wired at Story 2.18 substrate stage; only iteration-env config-render smokes + inline SC-11 dual-composer parity smoke + sync-gate manifest-anchor lockstep verify the AC commitments. Story 2.18 advances Story State in-dev → traced (FR14n lifecycle matrix); next QUEUE item: /bmad-create-story (args: "review") post-dev SM verification at iter-352 — forecast PATCH band 0-3 per iter-270 NOVEL LESSON drift-band re-baseline.
